bib.title: Formalizing an adaptive security infrastructure in mobadtl
bib.author: Carlo Montangero and Laura Semini
bib.abstract: We discuss an approach to the logic specification of an Adaptive Security Infrastructure and, within it, of a specific adaptive policy, namely a routing one. Our proposal is based on previous work on logic based specification of secure mobile systems. The approach builds on Mobadtl, a model for communication and mobility that has been formalized in the∆ DSTL (x) spatial-temporal logic.
